contests.title: Generations Missing
contests.description: Images generated from 1:00 AM UTC- 2:00 AM UTC are gone unfortunately and will be auto-refunded shortly. Images that were made with LyCoris models or Enhanced Compatibility will also be refunded.
contests.summary: Images generated from 1:00 AM UTC- 2:00 AM UTC are gone unfortunately and will be auto-refunded shortly. Images that were made with LyCoris models or Enhanced Compatibility will also be refunded....

contests.title: A GPU Crunch, and Bumpy Days Ahead
contests.description: Our primary data center is pulling GPU support to switch to mining, on under 48 hours notice. Generation still works but will be slower while we move. Here is the full picture and what to expect.
